title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — Copying the administrator certificate (optional)
text:
Clusters built with kubeadm often copy the
admin.conf
certificate into
$HOME/.kube/config
, as instructed in
Creating a cluster with kubeadm
.
On such a system, to update the contents of
$HOME/.kube/config
after renewing the
admin.conf
, you could run the following commands:
sudo cp -i /etc/kubernetes/admin.conf
$HOME
/.kube/config
sudo chown
$(
id -u
)
:
$(
id -g
)
$HOME
/.kube/config
